message:
test(frankenpandas): add Time-Series Operations integration test (br-9t5qk / fd90.178)

fd90.178: integration test for the README's 'Time-Series Operations'
section (lines 1254-1276). Exercises:
  - df.at_time("12:00:00")? / df.between_time(start, end)?
  - DatetimeAccessor (.dt() method) full surface:
    year/month/day/hour/minute/second/dayofweek/dayofyear/quarter/
    weekofyear/is_month_start/is_month_end/is_quarter_start/is_quarter_end/strftime
  - Timezone chain: series.dt().tz_localize(Some(tz))?
                    series.dt().tz_convert(Some(tz))?
    (Note: tz_convert needs a tz-aware Series, so the test feeds the
    output of tz_localize back into tz_convert.)

Builds a 4-row DataFrame indexed by ISO-datetime strings + a 3-row
datetime Series and verifies all chains compile end-to-end.

Verified:
- cargo test -p frankenpandas — 7 lib + 20 integration + 2 doctests
  all pass

Pure additive test. No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
